body:
Hey, just a reminder that you said you'd send me the weekly status doc by end of day today. I need it before the school board meeting tomorrow morning so I can update the budget section. Let me know if you're running behind — I can push the meeting prep to tonight if needed.

Also, can you make sure the Q2 numbers are in there this time? Last week's version was missing the April figures.

Colleen
snippet: Hey, just a reminder that you said you'd send me the weekly status doc by end of...
subject: Weekly status doc

body:
Sorry, got caught up in back-to-back calls this afternoon. Sending it over now — check your email in the next few minutes.

I added the April figures to the Q2 section and flagged a couple of line items I think are worth discussing before you present. Nothing alarming, just wanted you to have eyes on it first.

John
snippet: Sorry, got caught up in back-to-back calls this afternoon. Sending it over now —...
subject: Re: Weekly status doc

body:
Hey, are you free for lunch today? I was thinking we could try that new Italian place on Maple that opened last week — Sarah said the pasta is amazing. Around 12:30 maybe?

Let me know if work is crazy or if you want me to just pick something up instead. Either way works for me.

Colleen
snippet: Hey, are you free for lunch today? I was thinking we could try that new Italian ...
subject: Lunch today?

body:
12:30 works! I have a call at 11 that should wrap up by noon so I should be good. The Italian place sounds great, I've been wanting to check it out.

Should I make a reservation or do you think we can just walk in on a Monday?

John
snippet: 12:30 works! I have a call at 11 that should wrap up by noon so I should be good...
subject: Re: Lunch today?

body:
I just checked and they take walk-ins, so no need to call ahead. I'll meet you there at 12:30. It's 147 Maple, right next to that dry cleaner we used to go to.

Also can you grab the dry cleaning while you're at it? Ticket is on the counter. See you soon!

Colleen
snippet: I just checked and they take walk-ins, so no need to call ahead. I'll meet you t...
subject: Re: Lunch today?

body:
Hey, I finally pulled together the mood board for the living room refresh I've been talking about. I sent the Canva link to your personal email but realized you probably check this one more. Can you take a look when you get a chance? I'm trying to decide between the warm neutral palette and the cooler greige tones before I call the painter this week.

Also, I flagged two furniture options from Article — one sectional and one modular sofa. Let me know which layout you think works better for the space. I know you have strong opinions about traffic flow after the whole kitchen renovation debate.

No rush today, but I'd love to finalize by Thursday so we can order before the July 4th sale ends. — Colleen
snippet: Hey, I finally pulled together the mood board for the living room refresh I've b...
subject: Design review request - living room refresh

body:
Looked at the mood board during lunch. Honestly both palettes work, but I lean toward the greige — the warm neutrals felt a little close to what we already have in the hallway and I don't want it to bleed together.

On the sofas: go with the modular. The sectional is too big for that wall and we'll end up blocking the window again like we did with the old one. The modular gives us more flexibility if we ever rearrange.

Let me know if you want me to look at anything else before you call the painter. — John
snippet: Looked at the mood board during lunch. Honestly both palettes work, but I lean t...
subject: Re: Design review request - living room refresh

body:
Okay, greige it is. I actually agree once I looked at them side by side again. I've shortlisted two greige shades from Sherwin-Williams — Accessible Beige and Agreeable Gray. Can you glance at the swatches on page 3 of the board? I want to make sure one of them doesn't read too purple in the north-facing light.

And yes, I already ruled out the large sectional after your comment — ordering the modular in the stone fabric. Should arrive in 6–8 weeks which is perfect timing. — Colleen
snippet: Okay, greige it is. I actually agree once I looked at them side by side again. I...
subject: Re: Design review request - living room refresh

body:
Agreeable Gray is the safer call — Accessible Beige has gone slightly pink on us before in rooms without great afternoon light. The north-facing wall will make it worse.

Glad the modular worked out. Stone fabric is a good pick, easy to clean. Go ahead and lock everything in — sounds like you've got it all figured out anyway. — John
snippet: Agreeable Gray is the safer call — Accessible Beige has gone slightly pink on us...
subject: Re: Design review request - living room refresh

body:
Hey, just wanted to nail down a couple things before we leave Friday. Did you ever call the rental place to confirm the car? Last time I checked the confirmation email it still showed a midsize but I thought you upgraded it.

Also, Mom said she can pick up the kids Saturday afternoon but can't do Friday night. Are you okay leaving them with a sitter just for that one night? I think Maya from down the street is available.

Let me know what you're thinking. I'm going to start packing tonight.
snippet: Hey, just wanted to nail down a couple things before we leave Friday. Did you ev...
subject: Florida trip — a few things

body:
Yes, I called Hertz this morning — upgraded to an SUV, should be plenty of room for all our stuff. Confirmation is in my email if you need it.

Maya works for me. Can you text her? I'll have my hands full with the Thursday presentation and probably won't surface until late evening.

One thing I forgot to mention — the hotel check-in isn't until 4pm on Saturday. If we land at 11 we'll have a few hours to kill. Want to just grab lunch near the beach and wander around?
snippet: Yes, I called Hertz this morning — upgraded to an SUV, should be plenty of room ...
subject: Re: Florida trip — a few things

body:
Texted Maya, she's confirmed for Friday night. I'll leave her the usual instructions and some cash.

Lunch near the beach sounds perfect honestly. There's a place I bookmarked called The Deck at Island Inn — it's right on the water and the reviews look great. I'll make a reservation just in case it gets busy.

Don't forget your dress shoes. You left them last time and we had to scramble.
snippet: Texted Maya, she's confirmed for Friday night. I'll leave her the usual instruct...
subject: Re: Florida trip — a few things

body:
The Deck looks great, go ahead and book it. Maybe noon or 12:30?

Dress shoes are already in the suitcase, learned my lesson. I also threw in the sunscreen from the bathroom cabinet — the SPF 50 one, not the tanning stuff you somehow still own.

Flights look on time so far. I'll pull up the boarding passes tonight and drop them in the shared folder. We should probably leave for the airport by 7am at the latest to be safe.
snippet:
The Deck looks great, go ahead and book it. Maybe noon or 12:30?

Dress shoes ar...
subject: Re: Florida trip — a few things

body:
Booked for 12:30, they had a table right on the deck which felt like a good sign.

7am works — I'll set an alarm for 5:45 so we actually have time to get out the door without chaos. Can you load the big suitcase in the car Thursday night so we're not doing that half asleep?

Really looking forward to this. It's been a long few months.
snippet: Booked for 12:30, they had a table right on the deck which felt like a good sign...
subject: Re: Florida trip — a few things

body:
Hey, just got an email from the home warranty company saying our plan renews on July 3rd. It's going up to $67/month from $54. I know we've barely used it this year but after the dishwasher thing last spring I'm not sure I want to drop it entirely.

Can you take a look when you get a chance and let me know what you think? There's also a 3-year prepay option that brings it down to $58/month equivalent if we pay upfront. Might be worth it.

Colleen
snippet: Hey, just got an email from the home warranty company saying our plan renews on ...
subject: Service renewal - need your input

body:
Yeah, I saw that too. Honestly $67 feels steep for what we actually use it for, but you're right that the dishwasher repair would've cost us close to $400 out of pocket so it paid for itself that one time.

I'd say skip the 3-year prepay — we don't know if we'll still be in this house that long and I don't think they refund the difference. Let's just renew month-to-month for now and revisit in the fall when we have a better sense of the kitchen reno budget.

I'll call them Thursday to confirm. Don't worry about it.

John
snippet: Yeah, I saw that too. Honestly $67 feels steep for what we actually use it for, ...
subject: Re: Service renewal - need your input

body:
Hey, you mentioned last night that you picked up a shift swap at the station this week but I couldn't tell if you meant Wednesday or Thursday. I'm trying to figure out if we can still do dinner with the Garcias on Friday or if you're going to be at Engine 2 all weekend again.

Also your mom called and wants to know if we're coming up Saturday. I told her I'd check with you first.
snippet: Hey, you mentioned last night that you picked up a shift swap at the station thi...
subject: Shift swap this week

body:
It's the Thursday 24, covering for Danny — I'm on at the station from 0800 Thursday through 0800 Friday. So I'll be home well before dinner Friday.

Friday with the Garcias should be fine — I'm off the apparatus by then and just need to keep my phone on in case the crew needs anything. Tell them we're in.

Saturday I honestly don't know yet. If the shift's quiet I'll feel better about the drive up to see Mom. Let me see how Thursday plays out and I'll text you by EOD Friday.
snippet: It's the Thursday 24, covering for Danny — I'm on at the station from 0800 Thurs...
subject: Re: Shift swap this week

body:
Ok that works. I'll confirm with Maria for Friday.

For Saturday just let me know by noon so I can tell your mom. She's making that pasta thing so she needs to shop Thursday or Friday. Don't leave it until the last minute like the last time you had an incident and we cancelled on her twice in a row.

Hope Thursday goes smoothly.
snippet:
Ok that works. I'll confirm with Maria for Friday.

For Saturday just let me kno...
subject: Re: Shift swap this week
